info.title: Hesperida Web App Scanner API
info.description: Use WEB_API_KEY in an x-api-key header, and the token from auth signin/signup in a Bearer Authentication header

get.description: Returns schedules visible to the authenticated user. Optional filters by linked website or linked job.

post.description: Non-viewers only. Cron is interpreted in UTC. Frequency is limited by SCHEDULE_MIN_INTERVAL_SECONDS.

patch.description: Non-viewers only. Cron is interpreted in UTC. Frequency is limited by SCHEDULE_MIN_INTERVAL_SECONDS.

post.description: Owner-only. The recipient cannot be an existing viewer.

get.description: Verifies ownership using DNS TXT and HTTP (web root file) as fallback

post.description: Admin only. A password reset token is sent automatically via email.

get.description: Admin-only, except users can read their own record.

patch.description: Admin-only, except users can update their own basic profile fields.

group.description: Superuser-only. Send an empty string to generate a new unique group id.

409.description: User owns websites and cannot be deleted
User owns one or more websites

get.summary: Get all results of a job
Get single result of a job

post.description: Non-viewers only. Jobs are automatically parsed into job queue tasks and executed by the orchestrator.
Only non-viewers can unstuck tasks. Task must be pending and older than 5 minutes.
Only non-viewers can cancel tasks. Task must have waiting status.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed to access this resource.

Conflict.description: Resource state conflicts with requested operation.

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: Shared application API key required for non-auth API endpoints.

bearerAuth.description: SurrealDB user session token (Bearer) or equivalent authenticated cookie session.
